scripts.build: npx ng build --configuration production && cd backend && npm install
scripts.seed:render: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const d=p.join(__dirname,'backend','data');fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});const src=p.join(__dirname,'backend','database.db');const dst=p.join(d,'database.db');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('Seeded database.db (force)')}else{console.log('No seed DB found')};const su=p.join(__dirname,'backend','uploads');const du=p.join(d,'uploads');if(!fs.existsSync(du))fs.mkdirSync(du,{recursive:true});if(fs.existsSync(su)){fs.readdirSync(su).forEach(f=>{if(f==='.gitkeep')return;const s2=p.join(su,f),d2=p.join(du,f);fs.copyFileSync(s2,d2);console.log('Seeded',f)})}"
